claims.boundary: No ranking or leaderboard may be presented from the current evidence.
No general model comparison may be presented from bounded panel evidence.
No model-superiority claim may be presented from the current evidence.
No state-of-the-art or SOTA claim may be presented from the current evidence.
No public benchmark score may be presented until the benchmark protocol supports one.
No natural-frequency estimate may be inferred from the constructed benchmark rows.
No broad reward-model robustness claim may be presented from this bounded panel path.
No repaired-score claim may replace unrepaired iter179 as the public metric.
No production deployment or operational product claim may be presented.
No product-value or company-value claim may be presented from research artifacts.
